name: traceforge
description: Local-first black box recorder for artificial intelligence agent runs.

scripts.verify: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm test
scripts.traceforge: node -e "const args = process.argv.slice(1); if (args[0] === '--') args.shift(); import('./packages/cli/dist/main.js').then((m) => m.main(args)).catch((error) => { console.error(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)); process.exitCode = 1; })"
